column1: # ZAP baseline rules: one rule per line, tab-separated.
# Header-related findings are fixed at the server layer in serve.json; the rules
# below cover alerts that cannot be resolved without breaking the app or that
# represent intentional security trade-offs for a static SPA.

column4: Non-Storable / Storable Content - Cache-Control: no-store is intentional for a banking SPA
CSP style-src unsafe-inline - required by Radix UI, shadcn and Tailwind runtime inline styles; nonces are not feasible on a fully static build
Timestamp Disclosure (Unix) - false positive on 10-digit integers in minified JS bundles
Modern Web Application - informational SPA detection, not a vulnerability
Dangerous JS Functions - heuristic flags benign usage inside third-party libraries
